project_type: pnpm monorepo with Next.js apps and shared TypeScript packages
build_system: pnpm + turbo. Root scripts: pnpm turbo build/typecheck/lint/test
verification_instructions: Run pnpm turbo typecheck to confirm no TS errors across all packages
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22 + pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: All TypeScript must pass typecheck. Keep mock data as fallback on fetch errors. Add loading/error states.
key_patterns: Apps use Next.js app router (quantmail, quantchat, quantdrive, quantdocs, quantmeet) or pages router (quantube). Hooks use @tanstack/react-query for data fetching. Shared UI from @quant/shared-ui. Agent pilots extend IntelligentAgent and use AIEnginePort.infer/classify for AI.
directory_structure: apps/ - Next.js applications. packages/ - shared libraries. apps/quantube/src/pages/ - pages router pages. packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/ - AI pilot implementations.
